message: Please remember that I like dark-mode themes for all dashboards.
For future reference, my primary deploy target is Linux on AMD64.
Hi there. My name is Michel Duek and I work on this project.
By the way, please call me Mike rather than Michel.
I always use semantic commit messages with a scope tag.
I prefer Python over JavaScript for data-cleaning scripts.
My favorite editor is Neovim with a minimal plugin set.
I don't like emojis in commit message subject lines.
Can you help me debug this stack trace?
Today I prefer to skip lunch.
Right now I always end up reading the wrong file.
Tomorrow my favorite restaurant is hosting a quiz.
